reviews.comment:
Es una estación de servicio y punto. Sinceramente no entiendo a la gente que va a tomar un cafe ahí con la variedad de lugares con buena calefacción, mejores asientos, productos enlatados y precios mas baratos. Sin contar que es autoservice.  Tienen buen trato pero no es un lugar que recomiende ir con tanta oferta gastronomica que tiene Tandil.

(Translated by Google)
It's a gas station, period. Honestly, I don't understand people who go there for coffee when there are so many places with good heating, better seats, canned goods, and cheaper prices. Not to mention it's self-service. They're friendly, but it's not a place I'd recommend with all the other restaurants Tandil has to offer.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/8137682330194139512/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBeXBlXy13RRAB
